overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking across a foggy medieval stone bridge toward a city gate. The atmosphere is dark and moody with gothic stone architecture, transitioning from a crowded cobblestone section through a gatehouse to a wooden drawbridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone bridge approach with market stalls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the crowd on the cobblestone bridge

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking ahead in the same direction
guard in armor standing near the covered wagon

entered.detail: tall medieval stone tower with arched entrance looming ahead
wooden cart with canvas cover parked on the bridge side
rough wooden fence lining the left edge of the bridge
rough wooden fence lining the right edge of the bridge
silhouettes of castle towers visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a foggy cobblestone bridge toward a massive stone gate tower. The bridge is lined with wooden railings and populated with pedestrians including a woman in red and armored guards. A covered wagon sits parked on the right side as the camera approaches the tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge midpoint with stationary cart and livestock

events.description: passing the covered wagon and approaching a tethered horse on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the cart and horse toward the gate tower

notable_agents.action: brown horse standing tethered near the cart, facing away from camera

entered.detail: saddled brown horse standing on the cobblestones

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the bridge, Geralt passes the covered wagon and approaches a tethered horse standing on the right. The stone gate tower draws closer as the crowd thins out, with the cobblestone surface continuing underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gatehouse interior with guards posted

events.description: entering the shadow of the stone archway, ambient light dims significantly
passing through the gatehouse interior toward the wooden drawbridge exit

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the dark stone archway passing guards stationed at the gate

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor holding a polearm standing at attention

entered.detail: dark stone corridor with rough walls and torch light

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the dark stone archway of the gate tower, where the lighting drops significantly. Guards in red armor stand watch along the cobblestone corridor. The wooden railings disappear as the walls close in, and torchlight flickers on the stone surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden drawbridge with chain suspension over foggy water

events.description: exiting the gatehouse onto wooden plank bridge with heavy iron chains visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks across the creaking wooden drawbridge toward a distant hooded figure

notable_agents.action: hooded figure standing at the far end of the drawbridge facing the camera

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank surface with gaps showing water below
heavy iron chain suspension running along the left side
heavy iron chain suspension running along the right side
misty water visible through gaps in the wooden planks

segments.scene_description: Exiting the gatehouse, the scene transitions to a wooden drawbridge suspended by heavy iron chains. The planks are weathered and gaps reveal foggy water below. Geralt continues walking toward a lone hooded figure standing at the far end, with the fog thickening around the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, foggy cobblestone bridge into the oppressive shadow of a gatehouse before emerging onto a desolate wooden drawbridge. It begins with Geralt walking past pedestrians and a parked covered wagon toward a massive stone tower under a heavy mist. As the camera advances, the crowd thins and the open bridge gives way to the dark, enclosed stone archway of the gatehouse, where the lighting drops and torchlight flickers against the walls. The scene then shifts as Geralt exits the corridor, transitioning from solid stone to weathered wooden planks suspended by heavy iron chains. Finally, the camera moves across the gaps of the drawbridge toward a lone hooded figure as the surrounding fog thickens.
